name: TCIL_SetSectionState
title: TCIL_SetSectionState
syntax: long TCIL_SetSectionState (dbNode client, dword ddiOfCondensedState, dword elementNumber, dword sectionNumber, dword sectionState); // form 1
description: These functions set the state of a single section without sending any command.
For the already specified DDIs (currently in range DDI=0 and DDI=520), the functions check if the sectionNumber fits to the DDI.
The corresponding DDI (with states of 16 sections) can be sent with the methods TCIL_ValueCommand/TCIL_ValueAndAckCommand.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.
